title: Support - App, user not logged ever, no data
scenario: Guest onboarding shows "None" for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID, and "Unknown" for Last Connected in Support section after tapping App and Later buttons
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Complete the onboarding flow as a Guest (do not log in).
3. From the Home screen, tap the Support section (or navigate to Account → Support).
4. Tap the App button within the Support section.
5. Tap the Later button when prompted.
6. Observe the displayed information under the Support section.
expected: The Support section should display: App version (correct), App ID (correct), Tenant name (should show appropriate value or N/A), Tenant ID (should show appropriate value or N/A), User ID (should show appropriate value or N/A), and Last Connected (should show a valid timestamp or N/A).
